Update 8 independent 3PL models to support dynamic parameter injection. Begin migration toward MIRT as per ADR-004."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "AURA scores are scientifically invalid under current hardcoded IRT model. This violates ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION foundation laws on evidence-based design and risks user trust at scale.", "next_files_to_read": ["adr/ADR-004-assessment-engine.md", "scripts/audit_dif_bias.py", "apps/api/app/schemas/assessment.py"]}

findings.issue: IRT parameters (a, b, c, theta) are hardcoded, preventing model calibration from real-world or synthetic data. This invalidates CAT logic and undermines AURA score validity.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement parameter calibration pipeline using real pilot data or synthetic response patterns. Update 8 independent 3PL models to support dynamic parameter injection. Begin migration toward MIRT as per ADR-004.

whistleblower_flag: AURA scores are scientifically invalid under current hardcoded IRT model. This violates ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION foundation laws on evidence-based design and risks user trust at scale.
